summary: SoulSathiya Admin Dashboard testing completed successfully. All backend API endpoints (24 tests) and frontend UI flows (11 tests) passed. The admin panel is fully functional with login, dashboard metrics, user management, profile moderation, subscription management, deep exploration monitoring, reports, and analytics.

issues: React hydration warning for table structure: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - cosmetic issue in dev mode, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All admin pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Backend admin service properly excludes password_hash and _id from responses
Role-based access control (RBAC) is properly implemented for admin actions
Session management with cookies is working correctly
All API endpoints return proper HTTP status codes (200, 401, 404)
seed_data_creation: Admin user already created in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin dashboard is fully functional. Backend tests cover: authentication (login, logout, me endpoint), dashboard metrics, user management (list, search, detail), profile management (list, filter), subscription management (list), deep exploration monitoring (list), reports management (list, filter), and analytics. Frontend tests cover all navigation routes and login/logout flows.

features_tested.admin_login: PASS - Login at /admin/login with valid credentials
features_tested.users_page: PASS - Users page showing user list with actions dropdown
features_tested.profiles_page: PASS - Profiles page with photo viewing and filter
features_tested.subscriptions_page: PASS - Subscriptions page with tier management
